titleStmt.title: SII 33.121: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 121. (A.R. No. B 222 of 1950.) Nannūrupāḍu, Ongole Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Stone pillar lying in front of the Nannūramma temple to the north-east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1019, Vishuvu-saṅkrānti corresponding to 1097 A.D.
Registers the gift of the village Nannūru, free of all taxes, to the goddess Hōṅkāradēvi of the village by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāyana-chōḍa maharāja, son of Ballaya-chōḍa of the Telugu-choḍas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakavarṣaṁbulu 1019
śrāhi viṣuvu saṁkrāṁti nimittaṁbu
na svasti caraṇa sarōruha
vihata vilōcana trilō
cana pramukhākhilabra
thivīsvara kārita kāvēri
tīra karikālakularatna
pradīpāhita kumārāṁ
kuśa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
lēśvara rāyana cōḍama
hārājulu nannūri hyōṁkā
radēviki nannūru sisarvvakāra
parihāramu Ācaṁdrarkka
munaku niccitimi dīni mā
vaṁsamunavāraina noṇḍu
vaṁsamuna vārēni nīdharmma
vu rakṣiṁcunadi sva
dattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyōha
rēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasa
haśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatēkrimiḥ madvaṁśaḥ
jāḥ paramahīpati vaṁśajāvā
pāpādacēta manasā bhuvi bhā
vibhūpa yē pālayaṁti mama dha
rmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāmmayā
krita midāṁjalirēvamūrthni
Digital edition of SII 33.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
